overview: National Institute of Technology Silchar (NIT Silchar), located in Fakirtilla, Silchar, Assam, is a premier autonomous public technical university established in 1967. Originally founded as a Regional Engineering College (REC), it was elevated to a National Institute of Technology and declared an Institute of National Importance under the NIT Act in 2002. The institute is recognized for strong engineering education, high-impact research, modern digital infrastructure, and significant academic contributions across Northeast India.
accreditation: Institute of National Importance under the NIT Act; not NAAC accredited. Individual academic programs are accredited by the National Board of Accreditation (NBA).

coursesAndFees.tuitionFee: ₹62,500 tuition + ₹18,000 institutional fee per semester for General/OBC candidates with family income above ₹5 lakh. Students with income between ₹1–5 lakh receive 2/3rd tuition remission (~₹38,833 payable). Students with family income below ₹1 lakh receive full tuition waiver and pay only institutional charges (~₹18,000). SC/ST/PwD students are fully exempted from tuition fees.
Approximately ₹73,000 for the initial semester including hostel-related components. Subsequent semester fees are comparatively lower.
First semester base fee approximately ₹1,02,870. Total course fee without hostel expenses is approximately ₹2,39,000.

placements.avgSalary: ₹12.25 LPA overall engineering average (2025); ₹19.14 LPA average for B.Tech CSE
placements.medianSalary: ₹11.50 LPA overall B.Tech median (2025); ₹6.80 LPA median for postgraduate programs
placements.placementRate: B.Tech CSE: above 95%; Overall B.Tech: 73.15%–85% depending on branch
placements.companiesVisited: Amazon, Microsoft, Adobe, Arcesium India, Swiggy, Google, Deloitte, Oracle, SAP, Tata Consultancy Services (TCS)
placements.internationalOffers: High-value offers secured from leading global technology companies

admissions.admissionProcess: Undergraduate admissions are conducted through JoSAA/CSAB counseling based on JEE Main ranks. Postgraduate admissions are based on national-level entrance examinations such as GATE, CAT, and IIT JAM followed by institute counseling procedures.
admissions.importantDates: Admission schedules follow JoSAA, CCMT, CCMN, and institute academic calendars.

campus.specialNote: Hostel seat rent and utility charges are approximately ₹4,130 per semester. Mess advance ranges from ₹24,000–₹25,500 per semester. First-time hostellers must pay a refundable hostel caution deposit of ₹10,000.

contact.address: National Institute of Technology Silchar, Fakirtilla, Silchar – 788010, Assam, India

details: 100% and 66.6% tuition fee remission schemes based on verified annual family income
Central Sector Top-Class Scholarship Scheme for SC/ST students
MHRD assistantship of ₹12,400 per month for eligible GATE-qualified M.Tech students
Ph.D. scholars receive stipends starting from approximately ₹31,000 per month
Support through national and state scholarship portals for minority, OBC, and reserved-category students
